conclusion: Phase 1 (tunables infrastructure) delivers ZERO performance change as designed. Output is byte-for-byte identical (same 1317 nodes, 2560 edges, 102 files). The 3% 'speedup' is well within run-to-run noise. The 4-8x speedup requires phase 1.4 (ParseWorkerPool) + phase 2 (BatchStore) + phase 3 (git-native enumeration + content-hash skip).
nextBaseline: Use this report as the anchor for measuring the actual speedup when phase 1.4 lands. Expected: master-vs-feature median should drop from ~3170ms to ~500-800ms with worker pool + batch writes (4-8x faster).
